title: To Flavian, Bishop of Constantinople.

source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.text: (He acknowledges the receipt of Flavian’s second letter (xxvi.) and protests against the necessity for a general council, though at the same time he acquiesces in it.
Dated 21 June, a week after the Tome).
